backstory.original: Once the Lieutenant of Vecna, Kas betrayed his former master in a fight resulting in the dreaded artifacts, the Hand and Eye of Vecna. Kas is a vampire, legendary swordfighter, and ruthless warlord, and he is driven primarily by one thing: his hatred for Vecna.
backstory.display: 凯斯曾是维克那的副官，但在一场战斗中背叛了他的前主人，导致了可怕的神器——维克那之手和法眼的诞生。凯斯是一名吸血鬼、传奇剑士，也是一位冷酷无情的军阀，他唯一的驱动力就是对维克那的仇恨。

description.original: Kas attacks the closest enemy and other nearby foes with a sweep of his sword.
description.display: 凯斯用剑横扫攻击最近的敌人和附近的其他敌人。

longDescription.original: Kas moves up to the closest enemy and swings his sword, dealing one hit to all enemies in a small area.
longDescription.display: 凯斯移动到距离最近的敌人身边并挥舞长剑，对小范围内所有敌人发动一次攻击。

description.original: Kas summons two specters that deal ultimate damage each second for 15 seconds.
description.display: 凯斯召唤两个幽灵，每秒造成杀招伤害，持续 15 秒。

longDescription.original: Kas summons two specters that move towards enemies, dealing ultimate damage each second for 15 seconds.
longDescription.display: 凯斯召唤两个幽灵朝敌人飘去，每秒造成杀招伤害，持续 15 秒。

description.desc: Kas is Undead and counts as "dead" for the purposes of effects that care about dead Champions, but "alive" for all other purposes. Via his abilities, Kas may cause one or more other Champions in the formation to become his Vampire Spawns, which are also Undead.
对于影响死亡勇士的效果，凯斯为亡灵，并被视为“死亡”，对于所有其他效果则被视为“存活”。通过他的技能，凯斯可能使阵型中的一名或多名其他勇士变成他的吸血鬼衍体，这些吸血鬼衍体也会变成亡灵。
Kas increases his damage by $(amount)% for each Evil Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中的每位邪恶阵营勇士均使凯斯的伤害提高 $(amount)% %，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Kas increases his damage for each Evil Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
tipText.display: 阵型中的每位邪恶阵营勇士均使凯斯的伤害提高，以乘算方式堆叠。

description.desc: Every time an area is completed, Kas gains Pawn stacks equal to the number of Champions in the formation that are not one of his Vampire Spawns. Each Pawn stack increases the effect of Born Into Evil by $(amount___2)%, stacking multiplicatively. ^Non Vampire Spawn Champions: $(upgrade_stacks_total 15620,3)
每完成一个区域，凯斯就会获得棋子堆叠层数，其数量相当于阵型中的非凯斯吸血鬼衍体勇士数量。每层棋子堆叠层数均使生而为恶的效果提高 $(amount___2)%，以乘算方式堆叠。^非吸血鬼衍体勇士：$(upgrade_stacks_total 15620,3)
When an Undead Champion in the formation attacks, they regain $(amount) Hit Points.
当阵型中的一位亡灵勇士攻击时，重新获得 $(amount)  点生命值。

When a Champion that is not already Undead dies, they immediately resurrect at full health as a Vampire Spawn, counting as Undead for the rest of the adventure. The effect of Born Into Evil is increased by $(amount___2)% for each Undead Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
当一名未成为亡灵的勇士死亡时，会立即以满血状态复活为吸血鬼衍体，并在接下来的冒险中被视为亡灵。阵型中的每位亡灵勇士均使生而为恶的效果提高 $(amount___2)% ，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: When a Champion that isn't Undead is defeated, Kas brings them back as an Undead Vampire Spawn. Undead Champions also heal with every attack.
tipText.display: 当一名非亡灵勇士被击败时，凯斯会将他们复活为亡灵吸血鬼衍体。亡灵勇士每次攻击时也会恢复生命值。

description.desc: Kas increases the effect of Life Drain by $(amount)% and Evil Champions attack faster as their base attack cooldown is reduced by 0.5 seconds.
凯斯使生命汲取的效果提高 $(amount)，并使邪恶阵营勇士攻击速度更快，基本攻击冷却时间缩短 0.5 秒。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets___2

specializationDescription.original: Kas' Evil nature improves the healing abilities of his thralls.
specializationDescription.display: 凯斯的邪恶本性能够增强他奴仆的治疗能力。

description.desc: Kas' damage against Boss enemies is increased by $(amount)%, and the effect of Born Into Evil is increased by $(amount___2)% for each Undead Champion in the formation.

effect_keys.total_title: Total Buff to Born Into Evil

description.desc: 阵型中的每位亡灵勇士均使凯斯对首领敌人造成的伤害提高 $(amount)%，并使生而为恶的效果提高 $(amount___2)%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks___3

specializationDescription.original: Betraying those in charge is second nature for someone like Kas.
specializationDescription.display: 对于凯斯这样的人来说，背叛上位者是本能反应。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Born Into Evil by $(amount)%. In addition, Champions adjacent to Kas gain the Evil tag. This does not affect their other alignment tags, and doesn't affect whether they are eligible for the adventure.
使生而为恶的效果提高 $(amount)%。另外，与凯斯相邻的勇士获得邪恶标签。这不会影响他们的其他阵营标签，也不会影响他们是否有资格参加冒险。

specializationDescription.original: When in doubt, choose the evil path.
specializationDescription.display: 拿不定主意时，就选择邪恶之路。

description.desc: Unlocks Kas' Rise, Fallen Soldier! Ultimate Attack
解锁凯斯的“崛起吧，阵亡将士！”杀招攻击

description.original: I do not brawl in taverns - I feast on mortal fools.
description.display: 我不在酒馆里打架，我会尽情享用凡人的食物。

description.original: As my fangs sink into your neck - I want you to remember your life one last time.
description.display: 当我的尖牙扎进你的脖子时，我希望你最后一次回忆你的人生。

description.original: The Darkness made me who I am. It molded me into the man I am today.
description.display: 是黑暗造就了我，是它把我塑造成我现在的样子。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Born Into Evil ability by $amount%

description.original: On its own, it grows. With many, it flourishes.
description.display: 独自存在时，它会壮大。有众多共存时，它会变得猖獗。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Born Into Evil ability by $amount%

description.original: Mortals still serve some purposes.
description.display: 凡人还是有些用途的。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Mortal Pawns ability by $amount%

description.original: Some mortals are more devoted than others.
description.display: 有些凡人比其他人更虔诚。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Mortal Pawns ability by $amount%

description.original: Take what you need from these mortals - life and all.
description.display: 从这些凡人身上取走你需要的东西吧——生命和其他的一切。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Life Drain ability by $amount%

description.original: What is a man?
description.display: 什么是人？

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Life Drain ability by $amount%

description.original: Drink. And you will live forever.
description.display: 喝吧，喝了你就会永生了。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Spawn of Kas ability by $amount%

description.original: To do my bidding and to be my jackals when I want to feed.
description.display: 听从我的命令，当我要吃东西的时候成为我手下的豺狼。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Spawn of Kas ability by $amount%

description.original: I am the vengeance in your heart. I am the rage in your veins.
description.display: 我是你心中的复仇。我是你血管里的愤怒。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Kas the Bloody Handed, Kas the Betrayer, and Kas the Destroyer specializations by $amount%.

description.original: The voice... it's clearer now... it... it wants your death.
description.display: 那声音……现在变清晰了……它……它想要你死。

effects.description: Kas' damage is increased by 400% and his base attack cooldown is reset at the start of every area.

description.original: ARGH! HOW DARE YOU! I will consume you in my rage!
description.display: 啊！你好大的胆子！我会在怒火中吞噬你！

effects.description: Kas' attacks prevent the target from healing for $amount seconds

description.original: I've practiced the blade for centuries. You are nothing before me.
description.display: 我练了几个世纪的剑。在我面前，你什么也不是。

description.original: I would burn this world to ash for the sake of my revenge.
description.display: 为了复仇，我愿将这个世界化为灰烬。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Kas the Bloody Handed, Kas the Betrayer, and Kas the Destroyer specializations by $amount%.

description.original: I will take their lives. I shall drink their very souls. Their fate is sealed.
description.display: 我将取走他们的性命。我要喝下他们的灵魂。他们的命运已经注定了。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Born Into Evil ability by $amount%

description.original: Ah, such a rich vintage, with notes of fey. I must have more.
description.display: 啊，如此醇厚的佳酿，还带有精类生物的风味。我得多来点。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Life Drain ability by $amount%

description.original: Only a handful of mortals may say that they've earned my esteem.
description.display: 只有极少数的凡人可以说自己赢得了我的尊重。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Mortal Pawns ability by $amount%

description.original: I've lost touch with my true self for too long. No more.
description.display: 我疏远我真正的自我太久了。以后不会这样了。

effects.description: Grants Kas immunity to stun effects

description.original: In death, they offered me a new life. I would have been a fool to deny them.
description.display: 在死亡中，他们给了我新的生命。我要是拒绝他们就是傻瓜了。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Born Into Evil ability by $amount%

description.original: I can feel their influence on the fringes of my mind...
description.display: 我能感觉到他们的影响游走在我意识的边缘……

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Born Into Evil ability by $amount%

description.original: ...they need me to spread darkness across the multiverse. And I will.
description.display: ……他们要我在整个多元宇宙散播黑暗。我会的。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Born Into Evil ability by $amount%

description.original: I will be the heart of darkness within the light of hope.
description.display: 我将成为希望之光中的黑暗之心。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Born Into Evil ability by $amount%

description.original: I still remember the feeling of the blade slicing his neck.
description.display: 我依然记得利刃割破他脖子的感觉。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Mortal Pawns ability by $amount%

description.original: The look of terror on his decapitated head.
description.display: 他被砍下的头颅上的惊恐神情。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Mortal Pawns ability by $amount%

description.original: The sight of his lifeless body collapsed.
description.display: 看到他毫无生气的躯体，我感到万念俱灰。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Mortal Pawns ability by $amount%

description.original: How good the rage felt as the monster realized he had lost.
description.display: 当怪物意识到自己输了的时候，他的愤怒是多么美妙啊。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Mortal Pawns ability by $amount%

description.original: I once proudly rode under this banner.
description.display: 我曾骄傲地在这面旗帜下驰骋。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Life Drain ability by $amount%

description.original: The symbol strikes fear into the hearts of countless across the multiverse.
description.display: 这个徽记让多元宇宙里的无数人由心底里感到恐惧。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Life Drain ability by $amount%

description.original: I do not care of its power - this will never be used against me again.
description.display: 我不在乎它的力量，它永远不会再被用来对付我了。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Life Drain ability by $amount%

description.original: Sometimes I feel as if he can still see me through it...
description.display: 有时候我感觉他依然能通过它看见我……

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Life Drain ability by $amount%

description.original: No longer will I hide in the shadows. My name will be feared once again.
description.display: 我不会再躲藏在暗影之中了。我的名字将再次被人敬畏。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Spawn of Kas ability by $amount%

description.original: Those fools suspect nothing...
description.display: 那些傻瓜一点都不怀疑……

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Spawn of Kas ability by $amount%

description.original: ...soon they will bring me everything I need.
description.display: ……很快他们就会把我需要的一切拿来给我。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Spawn of Kas ability by $amount%

description.original: Soon, my friend, you will be free.
description.display: 我的朋友，你很快就可以自由了。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Spawn of Kas ability by $amount%

description.original: How many did I kill with one of these? Not just on the battlefield...
description.display: 我用这东西杀过多少人？不仅仅是在战场上……

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Kas the Bloody Handed, Kas the Betrayer, and Kas the Destroyer specializations by $amount%.

description.original: ...but in the towns and cities Vecna claimed in his conquest.
description.display: ……还有在维克那征服的过程中夺下的城镇之中。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Kas the Bloody Handed, Kas the Betrayer, and Kas the Destroyer specializations by $amount%.

description.original: Into this blade, I pour my anger, my rage, and my vengeance.
description.display: 我在这把剑上倾注了我的怒气、怒火和复仇。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Kas the Bloody Handed, Kas the Betrayer, and Kas the Destroyer specializations by $amount%.

description.original: It urged me to kill him. Haunted me with the thoughts of his death.
description.display: 它催促我杀了他，让我不断想起他的死。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Kas the Bloody Handed, Kas the Betrayer, and Kas the Destroyer specializations by $amount%.

description.original: The Dark Power granted me leave from Tovag....
description.display: 黑暗力量允许我离开托瓦……

effects.description: Reduces the cooldown on Kas' Ultimate Attack by $amount seconds

description.original: ...but I cannot exist far from its soil.
description.display: ……但我无法在远离它的土地上生存。

effects.description: Reduces the cooldown on Kas' Ultimate Attack by $amount seconds

description.original: I found this just after Tovag was created. Do the Dark Power mock me?
description.display: 我在托瓦被创造出来后不久找到了这个。黑暗力量在嘲笑我吗？

effects.description: Reduces the cooldown on Kas' Ultimate Attack by $amount seconds

description.original: A gift from Darkon so I may learn about my new form of dread...
description.display: 一份来自达孔的礼物，让我可以了解我新的恐惧形态……

effects.description: Reduces the cooldown on Kas' Ultimate Attack by $amount seconds
Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Male Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Human Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a STR score of 15 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Melee Champion in the formation

character_sheet_details.backstory: Once the Lieutenant of Vecna, Kas betrayed his former master in a fight resulting in the dreaded artifacts, the Hand and Eye of Vecna. Kas is a vampire, legendary swordfighter, and ruthless warlord, and he is driven primarily by one thing: his hatred for Vecna.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Kas is a DPS and Healing Champion that excels when used with Evil Champions. In addition, this Vampire Lord can turn living Champions into his thralls, granting the ability to recover lost hit points with every attack they make.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 凯斯曾是维克那的副官，但在一场战斗中背叛了他的前主人，导致了可怕的神器——维克那之手和法眼的诞生。凯斯是一名吸血鬼、传奇剑士，也是一位冷酷无情的军阀，他唯一的驱动力就是对维克那的仇恨。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 凯斯是一名伤害输出型与回复型勇士，在与邪恶阵营勇士搭配时表现出色。此外，这位吸血鬼领主可以将活着的勇士变成他的奴仆，使他们在每次攻击时恢复失去的生命值。

original.name: Vengeful Swing
original.description: Kas attacks the closest enemy and other nearby foes with a sweep of his sword.
original.long_description: Kas moves up to the closest enemy and swings his sword, dealing one hit to all enemies in a small area.

display.name: 复仇挥砍
display.description: 凯斯用剑横扫攻击最近的敌人和附近的其他敌人。
display.long_description: 凯斯移动到距离最近的敌人身边并挥舞长剑，对小范围内所有敌人发动一次攻击。

display.long_description: 凯斯召唤两个幽灵朝敌人飘去，每秒造成杀招伤害，持续 15 秒。

effects.description: Kas' damage is increased by 400% and his base attack cooldown is reset at the start of every area.

display.name: 凯斯之剑
display.description: 那声音……现在变清晰了……它……它想要你死。

effects.description: 凯斯的伤害提高 400%，他基本攻击的冷却时间在每个区域开始时重置。

original.name: Stake to the Heart
original.description: ARGH! HOW DARE YOU! I will consume you in my rage!

effects.description: Kas' attacks prevent the target from healing for $amount seconds

display.name: 插进心脏的木桩
display.description: 啊！你好大的胆子！我会在怒火中吞噬你！

effects.description: 凯斯的攻击阻止目标获得治疗，持续 $amount 秒

original.name: Cataclysmic Power
original.description: I would burn this world to ash for the sake of my revenge.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Kas the Bloody Handed, Kas the Betrayer, and Kas the Destroyer specializations by $amount%.

display.name: 灾变之力
display.description: 为了复仇，我愿将这个世界化为灰烬。

effects.description: 使凯斯的“血手凯斯”、“背叛者凯斯”和“毁灭者凯斯”专精效果提高 $amount%。

original.name: Weapon Master
original.description: I've practiced the blade for centuries. You are nothing before me.

display.name: 武器大师
display.description: 我练了几个世纪的剑。在我面前，你什么也不是。

original.name: Soul Shroud
original.description: I will take their lives. I shall drink their very souls. Their fate is sealed.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Born Into Evil ability by $amount%

display.name: 灵魂罩衣
display.description: 我将取走他们的性命。我要喝下他们的灵魂。他们的命运已经注定了。

effects.description: 使凯斯的“生而为恶”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Discerning Taste
original.description: Ah, such a rich vintage, with notes of fey. I must have more.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Life Drain ability by $amount%

display.name: 独到品味
display.description: 啊，如此醇厚的佳酿，还带有精类生物的风味。我得多来点。

effects.description: 使凯斯的“生命汲取”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Federates
original.description: Only a handful of mortals may say that they've earned my esteem.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Mortal Pawns ability by $amount%

display.name: 联合
display.description: 只有极少数的凡人可以说自己赢得了我的尊重。

effects.description: 使凯斯的“凡人棋子”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Resolute
original.description: I've lost touch with my true self for too long. No more.

effects.description: Grants Kas immunity to stun effects

display.name: 坚定
display.description: 我疏远我真正的自我太久了。以后不会这样了。

effects.description: 赋予凯斯免疫眩晕效果的能力

original.name: Dark Tidings
original.description: In death, they offered me a new life. I would have been a fool to deny them.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Born Into Evil ability by $amount%

display.name: 黑暗音信
display.description: 在死亡中，他们给了我新的生命。我要是拒绝他们就是傻瓜了。

effects.description: 使凯斯的“生而为恶”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Tendrils of Darkness
original.description: I can feel their influence on the fringes of my mind...

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Born Into Evil ability by $amount%

display.name: 黑暗卷须
display.description: 我能感觉到他们的影响游走在我意识的边缘……

effects.description: 使凯斯的“生而为恶”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Will of the Dark Powers
original.description: ...they need me to spread darkness across the multiverse. And I will.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Born Into Evil ability by $amount%

display.name: 黑暗力量的意志
display.description: ……他们要我在整个多元宇宙散播黑暗。我会的。

effects.description: 使凯斯的“生而为恶”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Crown of Lies
original.description: I will be the heart of darkness within the light of hope.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Born Into Evil ability by $amount%

display.name: 谎言王冠
display.description: 我将成为希望之光中的黑暗之心。

effects.description: 使凯斯的“生而为恶”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Memories of Glory
original.description: I still remember the feeling of the blade slicing his neck.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Mortal Pawns ability by $amount%

display.name: 荣耀记忆
display.description: 我依然记得利刃割破他脖子的感觉。

effects.description: 使凯斯的“凡人棋子”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Death of Vecna
original.description: The look of terror on his decapitated head.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Mortal Pawns ability by $amount%

display.name: 维克那之死
display.description: 他被砍下的头颅上的惊恐神情。

effects.description: 使凯斯的“凡人棋子”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: The Final Battle
original.description: The sight of his lifeless body collapsed.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Mortal Pawns ability by $amount%

display.name: 最后一战
display.description: 看到他毫无生气的躯体，我感到万念俱灰。

effects.description: 使凯斯的“凡人棋子”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Painting of Victory
original.description: How good the rage felt as the monster realized he had lost.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Mortal Pawns ability by $amount%

display.name: 胜利之画
display.description: 当怪物意识到自己输了的时候，他的愤怒是多么美妙啊。

effects.description: 使凯斯的“凡人棋子”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Former Banner
original.description: I once proudly rode under this banner.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Life Drain ability by $amount%

display.name: 昔日之旗
display.description: 我曾骄傲地在这面旗帜下驰骋。

effects.description: 使凯斯的“生命汲取”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Symbol of Vecna
original.description: The symbol strikes fear into the hearts of countless across the multiverse.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Life Drain ability by $amount%

display.name: 维克那之徽
display.description: 这个徽记让多元宇宙里的无数人由心底里感到恐惧。

effects.description: 使凯斯的“生命汲取”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Hand of Vecna
original.description: I do not care of its power - this will never be used against me again.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Life Drain ability by $amount%

display.name: 维克那之手
display.description: 我不在乎它的力量，它永远不会再被用来对付我了。

effects.description: 使凯斯的“生命汲取”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Eye of Vecna
original.description: Sometimes I feel as if he can still see me through it...

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Life Drain ability by $amount%

display.name: 维克那法眼
display.description: 有时候我感觉他依然能通过它看见我……

effects.description: 使凯斯的“生命汲取”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: The Key to Power
original.description: No longer will I hide in the shadows. My name will be feared once again.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Spawn of Kas ability by $amount%

display.name: 力量的关键
display.description: 我不会再躲藏在暗影之中了。我的名字将再次被人敬畏。

effects.description: 使凯斯的“凯斯之子”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Two of Seven
original.description: Those fools suspect nothing...

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Spawn of Kas ability by $amount%

display.name: 七之二
display.description: 那些傻瓜一点都不怀疑……

effects.description: 使凯斯的“凯斯之子”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Four of Seven
original.description: ...soon they will bring me everything I need.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Spawn of Kas ability by $amount%

display.name: 七之四
display.description: ……很快他们就会把我需要的一切拿来给我。

effects.description: 使凯斯的“凯斯之子”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: The Rod of Seven Parts
original.description: Soon, my friend, you will be free.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Spawn of Kas ability by $amount%

display.name: 七节权杖
display.description: 我的朋友，你很快就可以自由了。

effects.description: 使凯斯的“凯斯之子”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Start Down a Dark Path
original.description: How many did I kill with one of these? Not just on the battlefield...

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Kas the Bloody Handed, Kas the Betrayer, and Kas the Destroyer specializations by $amount%.

display.name: 踏上黑暗之路
display.description: 我用这东西杀过多少人？不仅仅是在战场上……

original.name: Lieutenant Sword
original.description: ...but in the towns and cities Vecna claimed in his conquest.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kas' Kas the Bloody Handed, Kas the Betrayer, and Kas the Destroyer specializations by $amount%.

display.name: 副官之剑
display.description: ……还有在维克那征服的过程中夺下的城镇之中。

original.name: Vengeful Sword
original.description: Into this blade, I pour my anger, my rage, and my vengeance.

display.name: 复仇之剑
display.description: 我在这把剑上倾注了我的怒气、怒火和复仇。

original.name: Sword of Kas
original.description: It urged me to kill him. Haunted me with the thoughts of his death.

display.name: 凯斯之剑
display.description: 它催促我杀了他，让我不断想起他的死。

original.name: A Piece of Home
original.description: The Dark Power granted me leave from Tovag....

display.name: 家乡的一部分
display.description: 黑暗力量允许我离开托瓦……

original.description: ...but I cannot exist far from its soil.

display.description: ……但我无法在远离它的土地上生存。

original.name: Symbol of Kas
original.description: I found this just after Tovag was created. Do the Dark Power mock me?

display.name: 凯斯之徽
display.description: 我在托瓦被创造出来后不久找到了这个。黑暗力量在嘲笑我吗？

original.description: A gift from Darkon so I may learn about my new form of dread...
